scripts.build:lambdas: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/tool-work-search run build && pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/tool-rag-search run build && pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/tool-supervisor run build
scripts.eval:smoke: pnpm eval:agent -- --agent supervisor --input scripts/examples/agent-eval.example.jsonl --output tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas.jsonl --output-format ragas --fail-fast && pnpm eval:ragas -- --input tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas.jsonl --output tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas-results.json && pnpm eval:gate
scripts.eval:ci: pnpm eval:agent -- --agent supervisor --input eval/golden-set.jsonl --output tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas.jsonl --output-format ragas && pnpm eval:ragas -- --input tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas.jsonl --output tmp/evals/supervisor-ragas-results.json && pnpm eval:gate
scripts.rag:dev: uv run --project apps/rag-service uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/rag-service --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --reload
scripts.rag:start: uv run --project apps/rag-service uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/rag-service --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.rag:lint: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra lint ruff check apps/rag-service
scripts.rag:lint:fix: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra lint ruff check --fix apps/rag-service
scripts.rag:format: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra lint black apps/rag-service
scripts.rag:format:check: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra lint black --check apps/rag-service
scripts.rag:test: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra test pytest apps/rag-service/tests
scripts.rag:test:cov: uv run --project apps/rag-service --extra test pytest apps/rag-service/tests --cov=apps/rag-service/app --cov-report=term-missing
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm rag:lint && pnpm rag:test
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk deploy --progress events BedrockAgentsStack
scripts.deploy:data: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk deploy --progress events Neo4jDataStack
scripts.deploy:monitoring: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk deploy --progress events MonitoringEc2Stack
scripts.deploy:phoenix: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk deploy --progress events PhoenixEc2Stack
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk deploy --progress events Neo4jDataStack MonitoringEc2Stack PhoenixEc2Stack BedrockAgentsStack
scripts.destroy:all: pnpm --filter @aws-bedrock-multiagents/infra-cdk exec cdk destroy BedrockAgentsStack Neo4jDataStack MonitoringEc2Stack PhoenixEc2Stack --force
